description: KZ discusses the importance of building beyond just the product in the crypto space, emphasizing the human side of business and the significance of team dynamics, partnerships, and community engagement.
topic_summary: KZ explores the concept of building a business in the crypto space, highlighting the roles of team, partners, and community in creating a successful protocol. He uses the analogy of galaxies to illustrate how these elements interact and influence each other [t=249:16].
